message:
fix(combinator): join2 dual-cancellation strengthening and SelectAllDrain simultaneous-ready safety

join2_outcomes / join2_to_result: When both branches return Cancelled, the
previous code fell through to the single-Cancelled arm which arbitrarily
kept whichever reason matched first. Now both functions explicitly handle
the (Cancelled, Cancelled) case by calling CancelReason::strengthen() to
preserve the highest-severity reason, matching the severity lattice already
used by join_all_outcomes. Adds regression tests verifying commutativity
(User+Shutdown and Shutdown+User both yield Shutdown) for both functions.

SelectAllDrain: When multiple futures are simultaneously Ready on a single
poll, the previous code only removed the winner from the futures vec and
returned all others as "losers". Re-polling a completed future (e.g.
std::future::Ready) panics. Now tracks all simultaneously-completed
non-winner indices, removes them in descending order via swap_remove (so
index invalidation is avoided), and excludes them from the losers vec.
Updates the existing all-ready test assertion from 2 losers to 0, and adds
a dedicated regression test using TrackableFuture with poll-count tracking
to verify that only genuinely pending futures appear in losers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
